name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery
notes:
This Building Block triggers when windows software is discovered.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nikita Nazarov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Detected Windows Software Discovery
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may attempt to enumerate software for a variety of reasons, such as figuring out what security measures are present or if the compromised system has a version of software that is vulnerable.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of reg.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%query%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%_software_%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/v%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%svcversion%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of reg.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%query%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%_software_%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/v%') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%svcversion%') AQL filter query
